title: Bhoomi
desc: Bhoominathan, a NASA scientist, helps his village people against the evil corporations.

title: Romancham
desc: A group of seven men attempt to conduct a seance, only to find themselves in a predicament when a spirit begins to answer their queries.

desc: Three teenagers struggle when they get stuck in a love triangle. They try to deal with the complications of relationships.

title: Ghajinikanth
desc: Rajnikanth, a man suffering from selective amnesia, meets the woman of his dreams and attempts to hide his condition from her.
